title: affaan-m/ECC
summary: ECC是一个用于Claude Code、Codex等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，集成了技能、直觉、记忆、安全与研究优先开发功能。
translated_summary: ECC is an agent harness performance optimization system for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond, featuring skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
